markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To evaluate the strategic value and process of patenting GrowthX's new open-source product.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Patent for Defensibility, Not Revenue:** The primary goal is to create prior art, preventing competitors from patenting the core technology and blocking GrowthX. A patent's M\&A value is limited if the tech is open-source.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Patent the Whole Stack:** File a provisional patent covering the entire system, as the unique combination of components (e.g., plain-text workflow language, custom trace file) is the key innovation.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**File Before Launch (Ideally):** Filing before the mid-December launch secures international rights. Post-launch filing is viable due to a 1-year US grace period, but sacrifices foreign patentability.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Phased Cost:** The provisional patent costs \~$7,500 (attorney fees) + \~$130 (USPTO fee). Converting to a non-provisional application within 12 months costs an additional \~$20,000 (attorney fees) + \~$1,000 (USPTO fee).](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

## Topics

### Patent Strategy for an Open-Source Product

  - [**Core Question:** Is patenting valuable for a product that will be open-sourced?](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [**Sanj's Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [**Defensive Value:** Creates prior art, preventing competitors from patenting the tech and blocking GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Future Options:** Preserves the option to monetize premium features or pivot to a freemium model later.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [**Irreversible Decision:** Once released, the tech is dedicated to the public and cannot be patented.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**M\&A Value:** A patent's M\&A value is low if the technology is already free, as the market value is effectively zero.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Patent Scope & Filing Process

  - [**Product Overview:** An AI workflow framework with a unique plain-text language for defining workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Key Innovations:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Plain-text language for defining workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Custom "trace file" format for storing execution data.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Unique combination of existing open-source components.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Filing Approach:** File a broad provisional patent covering the entire stack.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The innovation lies in the unique combination of components, not just individual parts.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Timing:** A prior art search is deferred to the non-provisional conversion stage to save initial cost.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Timing & Cost

  - [**Launch Timeline:** Mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Filing Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Ideal:** File provisional patent before launch to secure international rights.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Viable:** File after launch using the 1-year US grace period. This sacrifices foreign patentability but still creates US prior art.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Process:** Requires \~1 month from receiving documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Cost Breakdown:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Provisional Patent:** \~$7,500 (attorney fees) + \~$130 (USPTO fee).](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Non-Provisional Conversion:** \~$20,000 (attorney fees) + \~$1,000 (USPTO fee).](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### Trademark Strategy

  - [**Product Name:** "output.ai."](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Trademarkability:** The name is descriptive, making it difficult to register as a trademark initially.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Implication:** GrowthX can use the name but cannot prevent others from doing so.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Future Potential:** Registration may be possible if the name acquires secondary meaning (e.g., "Google" for search).](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [Finalize internal documentation for the mid-December launch.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [Decide on the provisional patent filing timeline (pre- or post-launch).](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [Send final documentation to Sanj to begin the filing process.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**Sanj:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [Draft the provisional patent application upon receiving documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/zWPkrg8YmbdvNzRsMv6tRApU9QrazE9z?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
